name: agent-pipeline
description: The Agent-Pipeline plugin marketplace: one versioned source of truth for the agentic operating model (Elephant / Goldfish / Critic) across all projects. Single plugin source: ./plugins/pipeline-core.

plugins.name: pipeline-core
plugins.description: The Agent-Pipeline core plugin: roles, two-stage review gates, git guardrails, and session bootstrap for Claude Code. Projects bind it via committed extraKnownMarketplaces + enabledPlugins (pipeline-core@agent-pipeline). Ships without a version pin: every commit propagates on refresh.
